query: SELECT m.id, m.patientId, m.senderId, m.receiverId, m.isRead, m.content, u_sender.name as senderName, u_receiver.name as receiverName FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users u_sender ON m.senderId = u_sender.id LEFT JOIN users u_receiver ON m.receiverId = u_receiver.id WHERE m.isRead = false ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Loc9eiqTeCpHbm.bfc0203d8e87 --database 2VRczM8SEoMgkRv9pxV2Z3 --execute SELECT m.id, m.patientId, m.senderId, m.receiverId, m.isRead, m.content, u_sender.name as senderName, u_receiver.name as receiverName FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users u_sender ON m.senderId = u_sender.id LEFT JOIN users u_receiver ON m.receiverId = u_receiver.id WHERE m.isRead = false ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC;
